problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
